CONTENT.International career: He made his debut for Croatia on 16 November 2019, starting in a decisive home Euro 2020 qualifier against Slovakia and assisting Croatia's first goal in the 3–1 win that saw Croatia qualify for UEFA Euro 2020.

SUMMARY: Dino Perić (born 12 July 1994) is a Croatian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Dinamo Zagreb.
